name: Email format validation
task: Create /tmp/eval_email/email.py with is_valid_email(s) using a regex matching: [alphanum._%+-]+ @ [alphanum.-]+ . [alpha]{2+}. Anchored at both ends.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_email/email.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); V = mod.is_valid_email; assert V('user@example.com'); assert V('first.last+tag@sub.domain.org'); assert not V('plainaddress'); assert not V('@nodomain.com'); assert not V('missing@dot'); print('OK')
